title: Cyberpunk Lada Niva 4x4/2077
description:
Cyberpunk Lada Niva 4x4/2077
for the release of cyberpunk 2077 made another art.
I don't care that they hate the game , it turned out to be very cool, the graphics are at a height, you can only walk and look at it for hours without passing the game )!
I'm thinking is there anything else to do in this style ?
Maybe someone does not know but Niva is a cult SUV in Russia and in the world in principle, not whimsical, but the design has not changed for a long time, perhaps over the years it has become better !
https://www.instagram.com/p/CI1Hi0Tpbb-/

title: Shion
description:
Series of images captured live in Cyberpunk 2077 and post-processed in Photoshop. Below you can see a "before & after" picture. Not really much changes on this one. 
I've never actually started playing the game, because I like cars. This is a 17-years-old Japanese car Mizutani Shion MZ, that I stumbled upon as soon as I left the apartment. 

Photo mode in this game is.. not really what I was expecting by the end of 2020. It lacks a lot of features, generally: time of day & weather controls; lighting and vehicle-specific tools, as in "advanced" category. Videographers also would love to have something useful as well. After all, it's just a start, eh?
Though, the game looks great, especially with RTX ON.

title: Vatican(ish) Unreal Engine
description:
My entry for an art test -An approximation of the "The New Wing" (Braccio Nuovo) Vatican museum.
I had limited time to get everything done and the scene was completed in 36 hours. I subsequently went back and reworked some aspects of the scene and created the sequencer video. The scene is fully dynamically lit with ray traced global illumination running on a Quadro RTX4000.
All the statues are from MyMiniFactory -Scan the World - these were all individually brought into Zbrush - dessimated and then transferred into 3DSMax for unwrapping with the Flatiron modifier.
Software used: 3DSMax , Zbrush , Substance Painter, Quixel Mixer, Flatiron and of course Unreal Engine.

Hey guys! this is my new 3D sculpting Ariel from the Little Mermaid 2D animated movie. I made this for a Mermay challenge and also some of you requested to make her and I think it's a good idea for this month since Ariel is also a mermaid lmao 🤣 the most challenging part is her face expression and the scales part but I'm having fun while making this model. title: Ferrari F40 - custom kit
description:
Some more 3D practice. This time i had help from Dangeruss https://www.artstation.com/dangeruss

The Ferrari F40 (Type F120) is a mid-engine, rear-wheel drive sports car built from 1987 to 1992, with the LM and GTE race car versions continuing production until 1994 and 1996 respectively. As the successor to the 288 GTO, it was designed to celebrate Ferrari's 40th anniversary and was the last Ferrari automobile personally approved by Enzo Ferrari. At the time it was Ferrari's fastest, most powerful, and most expensive car for sale.

The car debuted with a planned production total of 400 units and a factory suggested retail price of approximately US$400,000 (5-fold the price of its predecessor, the 288 GTO) in 1987 ($900,000 today). One of those that belonged to the Formula One driver Nigel Mansell was sold for the then record of £1 million in 1990, a record that stood into the 2010s. A total of 1,315 cars were manufactured with 213 units destined for the United States.

ALL the credit for the model goes to the original author. We did the customizations/shaders/scene/rendering/post work. Love it or hate it, choice is yours. Renders not to be used in any commercial purposes, this is done for my own personal portfolio and more importantly for FUN! 3ds Max + Corona +  Photoshop
